---
title: 'Hebrew and Greek Words that bear further look:'
date: '2013-03-24T21:20:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Towdah: tō·dä'''
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8737043376132045198'
blogger_filename: '/2013/03/hebrew-and-greek-words-that-bear.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Towdah_ tō·dä_/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Insight'
---

<br />
<div style="color: #333333; font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Bitstream Charter', Times, serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 19px;">
Hebrew and Greek Words that bear further look:</div>
<table border="0" cellpadding="1" cellspacing="0" class="mceItemTable" style="border: 1px dashed rgb(187, 187, 187); cursor: default; font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Bitstream Charter', Times, serif; width: 100%px;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="border: 1px dashed rgb(187, 187, 187); cursor: text; font-family: Verdana, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; margin: 8px;"><a data-mce-href="/lang/lexicon/Lexicon.cfm?strongs=H5329" href="http://towdah.wordpress.com/lang/lexicon/Lexicon.cfm?strongs=H5329">H5329</a></td><td style="border: 1px dashed rgb(187, 187, 187); cursor: text; font-family: Verdana, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; margin: 8px;"><em>natsach</em></td><td style="border: 1px dashed rgb(187, 187, 187); cursor: text; font-family: Verdana, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; margin: 8px;">nä·tsakh'</td><td style="border: 1px dashed rgb(187, 187, 187); cursor: text; font-family: Verdana, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; margin: 8px;">musician, set forward, overseers, excel, oversee, perpetual, chief singer</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<table border="0" cellpadding="1" cellspacing="0" class="mceItemTable" style="border: 1px dashed rgb(187, 187, 187); cursor: default; font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Bitstream Charter', Times, serif; width: 100%px;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="border: 1px dashed rgb(187, 187, 187); cursor: text; font-family: Verdana, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; margin: 8px;"><a data-mce-href="/lang/lexicon/Lexicon.cfm?strongs=H7991" href="http://towdah.wordpress.com/lang/lexicon/Lexicon.cfm?strongs=H7991">H7991</a></td><td style="border: 1px dashed rgb(187, 187, 187); cursor: text; font-family: Verdana, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; margin: 8px;"><em>shaliysh</em></td><td style="border: 1px dashed rgb(187, 187, 187); cursor: text; font-family: Verdana, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; margin: 8px;">shä·lēsh'</td><td style="border: 1px dashed rgb(187, 187, 187); cursor: text; font-family: Verdana, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; margin: 8px;">captain, lord, instrument of&nbsp;musick, great measure, excellent thing, measure, prince</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<table border="0" cellpadding="1" cellspacing="0" class="mceItemTable" style="border: 1px dashed rgb(187, 187, 187); cursor: default; font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Bitstream Charter', Times, serif; width: 100%px;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="border: 1px dashed rgb(187, 187, 187); cursor: text; font-family: Verdana, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; margin: 8px;"><a data-mce-href="/lang/lexicon/Lexicon.cfm?strongs=H7892" href="http://towdah.wordpress.com/lang/lexicon/Lexicon.cfm?strongs=H7892">H7892</a></td><td style="border: 1px dashed rgb(187, 187, 187); cursor: text; font-family: Verdana, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; margin: 8px;"><em>shiyr</em></td><td style="border: 1px dashed rgb(187, 187, 187); cursor: text; font-family: Verdana, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; margin: 8px;">shēr</td><td style="border: 1px dashed rgb(187, 187, 187); cursor: text; font-family: Verdana, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; margin: 8px;">song,&nbsp;musick, singing,&nbsp;musical, sing, singers, song</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<table border="0" cellpadding="1" cellspacing="0" class="mceItemTable" style="border: 1px dashed rgb(187, 187, 187); cursor: default; font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Bitstream Charter', Times, serif; width: 100%px;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="border: 1px dashed rgb(187, 187, 187); cursor: text; font-family: Verdana, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; margin: 8px;"><a data-mce-href="/lang/lexicon/Lexicon.cfm?strongs=H7705" href="http://towdah.wordpress.com/lang/lexicon/Lexicon.cfm?strongs=H7705">H7705</a></td><td style="border: 1px dashed rgb(187, 187, 187); cursor: text; font-family: Verdana, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; margin: 8px;"><em>shiddah</em></td><td style="border: 1px dashed rgb(187, 187, 187); cursor: text; font-family: Verdana, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; margin: 8px;">shid·dah'</td><td style="border: 1px dashed rgb(187, 187, 187); cursor: text; font-family: Verdana, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; margin: 8px;">musical instrument</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<table border="0" cellpadding="1" cellspacing="0" class="mceItemTable" style="border: 1px dashed rgb(187, 187, 187); cursor: default; font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Bitstream Charter', Times, serif; width: 100%px;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="border: 1px dashed rgb(187, 187, 187); cursor: text; font-family: Verdana, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; margin: 8px;"><a data-mce-href="/lang/lexicon/Lexicon.cfm?strongs=G4858" href="http://towdah.wordpress.com/lang/lexicon/Lexicon.cfm?strongs=G4858">G4858</a></td><td style="border: 1px dashed rgb(187, 187, 187); cursor: text; font-family: Verdana, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; margin: 8px;"><em>symphōnia</em></td><td style="border: 1px dashed rgb(187, 187, 187); cursor: text; font-family: Verdana, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; margin: 8px;">süm-fō-nē'-ä</td><td style="border: 1px dashed rgb(187, 187, 187); cursor: text; font-family: Verdana, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; margin: 8px;">music</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<table border="0" cellpadding="1" cellspacing="0" class="mceItemTable" style="border: 1px dashed rgb(187, 187, 187); cursor: default; font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Bitstream Charter', Times, serif; width: 100%px;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="border: 1px dashed rgb(187, 187, 187); cursor: text; font-family: Verdana, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; margin: 8px;"><a data-mce-href="/lang/lexicon/Lexicon.cfm?strongs=G3451" href="http://towdah.wordpress.com/lang/lexicon/Lexicon.cfm?strongs=G3451">G3451</a></td><td style="border: 1px dashed rgb(187, 187, 187); cursor: text; font-family: Verdana, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; margin: 8px;"><em>mousikos</em></td><td style="border: 1px dashed rgb(187, 187, 187); cursor: text; font-family: Verdana, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; margin: 8px;">mü-sē-ko's</td><td style="border: 1px dashed rgb(187, 187, 187); cursor: text; font-family: Verdana, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; margin: 8px;">musician</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
